_description: Reference: sys-geo-contextual-menu (W7.1) — page-injection extension that overrides the right-click context menu with Copy-as-MD / Copy-as-JSON-LD / Open-in-ChatGPT / Open-in-Claude actions. Cmd/Ctrl+Shift+RightClick falls through to the native browser menu. OFF by default per `content_settings.extensions.contextual_menu.enabled`.
_no_block_needed: Page-injection extension activates automatically when contextual_menu.enabled=true. Inject a page-block only if you want to override per-page (rare).
_a11y_notes: Actions are keyboard-accessible (Tab + Enter); not just pointer-driven.
Reduced-motion preference disables fade-in animation on the custom menu.
